zh.Quesnay, Estrées la Campagne, Calvados,: 法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯艾斯特雷-拉-坎帕格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Cheyne於大約1130年出生在英國英格蘭素可紐姆時，她的父親John de Caisneto Cheyne37歲，母親Sybil Elizabeth31歲。她於大約1150年與Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton在英國素可結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1190年享年62歲。

zh-hans.Quesnay, Estrées la Campagne, Calvados,: 法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯艾斯特雷-拉-坎帕格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Cheyne于大约1130年出生在英国英格兰素可紐姆时，她的父亲John de Caisneto Cheyne37岁，母亲Sybil Elizabeth31岁。她于大约1150年与Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton在英国素可结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1190年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Cheyne was born about 1130, in Newtimber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Caisneto Cheyne, was 37 and her mother, Sybil Elizabeth, was 31. She married Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton about 1150, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1190, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Cheyne est née environ 1130, à Newtimber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Caisneto Cheyne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sybil Elizabeth, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton environ 1150, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1190, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Cheyne um 1130 in Newtimber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Caisneto Cheyne 37 und ihre Mutter Sybil Elizabeth 31. Sie hat um 1150 in Sussex, England Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1190 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Cheyne è nata il circa 1130 nel Newtimber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Caisneto Cheyne, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Sybil Elizabeth, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton circa 1150, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1190, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Cheyneが約1130年にイギリスイギリススセックスニューティンバーで生まれた時，父John de Caisneto Cheyneは37歳，母Sybil Elizabethは31歳であった。約1150年にイギリススセックスでSir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokeftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1190年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Cheyne(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 뉴팀버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Caisneto Cheyne(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Elizabeth(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1150년 영국 수세스에서 Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Cheyne nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Newtimber, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Caisneto Cheyne, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Elizabeth, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton aproximadamente 1150, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1190, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Cheyne родилась около 1130 г. в местности нютимбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Caisneto Cheyne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Elizabeth, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton около 1150 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1190 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Sir Michael Belet Lord of Wrokefton aproximadamente 1150, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1190, a la edad de 62 años.
